nodes.title: Render only when a current slide exists
nodes.why: The @if alias keeps image bindings inside the non-null branch and avoids repeated getter reads in the template.
nodes.alternative: Render the figure unconditionally and use non-null assertions for every slide property.
nodes.tradeoff: The explicit branch adds template structure, but it keeps empty-data behavior safe.

nodes.title: Track indicator buttons by slide id

anchor.snippet: @for (slide of slides; track slide.id; let i = $index) {

nodes.why: Stable ids let Angular retain the correct indicator DOM as slides are reordered or replaced.
nodes.alternative: Track every indicator by its current array index.
nodes.tradeoff: Stable tracking needs an id on each slide, but it avoids identity drift when the collection changes.

nodes.title: Reject out-of-range navigation
nodes.why: The same boundary contract protects dot navigation and keeps currentSlide valid.
nodes.alternative: Assign any requested index and rely on disabled previous or next buttons.
nodes.tradeoff: A guard is a small extra branch, but it makes the method safe for all callers.
